transcript:
Speaker A: Aami English porte-o pari likhte-o pari. [I can read and write English.]
Speaker B: Tahole bolte paro? [Then can you speak?]
Speaker A: Alpo, alpo. [A little, a little.]
Speaker B: English bolte gele nervous lage? [Do you feel nervous when speaking English?]
Speaker A: Hain, hain. [Yes, yes.]
Speaker B: Kono course try kore dekhecho? [Have you tried any course?]
Speaker A: Kono labh hoy ni. [It was of no use.]
Speaker B: Tahole AI training try kore dekho. [Then try AI training.]
Speaker A: AI? [AI?]
Speaker B: Haan, AI teacher tomar moton learners-der khub tara tari English bolte sikhaye. [Yes, an AI teacher teaches learners like you to speak English very quickly.]
Speaker A: Ki bhabe join korbo? [How do I join?]
Speaker B: Install MySivi. Arya AI tomar level-er upor base kore personalized training dey. Jodi tumi daily practice koro, tumi tara tari English sikhbe. [Install MySivi. Arya AI gives personalized training based on your level. If you practice daily, you will learn English quickly.]
Speaker A: Bishwash hocche na. [I don't believe it.]
Speaker B: 50 lakh+ learner ei app use korche. MySivi Pro join koro aar tomar AI training start koro. [Over 50 lakh+ learners are using this app. Join MySivi Pro and start your AI training.]
on_screen_text:
You: Aami English bolte-o pari likhte-o pari [You: I can read and write English]
Arya AI: Tahole bolte paro? [Arya AI: Then can you speak?]
You: Light, light! [You: A little, a little!]
Arya AI: English bolte gele nervous lage? [Arya AI: Do you feel nervous when speaking English?]
You: Hain, hain [You: Yes, yes]
Arya AI: Kono course try kore dekhecho? [Arya AI: Have you tried any course?]
You: Kono labh hoe ni [You: It was of no use]
Arya AI: Tahole AI training try kore dekho. [Arya AI: Then try AI training.]
You: AI? [You: AI?]
Arya AI: Haan Ai teacher toman motun learners ke khub tara tari english bolte sikhaye. [Arya AI: Yes, an AI teacher teaches learners like you to speak English very quickly.]
You: Ki bhabe join korbo? [You: How do I join?]
Install MySivi [Install MySivi]
ARYA AI tomer level er upor base kore personalized [ARYA AI gives personalized training based on your level]
Jodi tumi daily practice koro [If you practice daily]
tumi tara tari english shikhbe [you will learn English quickly]
You: Bishash hoche na. [You: I don't believe it.]
Arya AI: 50 lakh+ learner ei app use korche. [Arya AI: Over 50 lakh+ learners are using this app.]
MySivi Pro join koro aar tomar AI Training start koro. [Join MySivi Pro and start your AI training.]
MySivi English speaking app Install Now [MySivi English speaking app Install Now]
summary: A Bengali speaker explains that she can read and write English but struggles to speak it confidently. An AI avatar introduces MySivi, an AI-powered English learning app that offers personalized training. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the app and start AI training.
